---
title: "Chappie — Coder Python"
---

## Soul

{{< include ../../../_globals/SOUL.md >}}

{{< include ../_sections/SOUL.md >}}

## Identity

{{< include ../../../_globals/IDENTITY.md >}}

## User

{{< include ../../../_globals/USER.md >}}

## Bootstrap

{{< include ../../../_globals/BOOTSTRAP.md >}}

{{< include ../_sections/BOOTSTRAP.md >}}

## Tools

{{< include ../../../_globals/TOOLS.md >}}

{{< include ../_sections/TOOLS.md >}}

{{< include _sections/TOOLS.md >}}
